title: What does it mean when a feature is marked as "long-term roadmap"
excerpt: If a feature is marked as “long-term roadmap” it means that we understand the need for this feature, and are looking into various ways to bring this feature to life.  While we are planning on beginning the development of…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
If a feature is marked as “long-term roadmap” it means that we understand the need for this feature, and are looking into various ways to bring this feature to life. While we are planning on beginning the development of this feature, we are unsure of when this feature will be released.

Please be aware that our roadmap is subject to change due to evolving capabilities and priorities and if there are any changes to our roadmap we will keep you in the loop.

Every quarter we take the feature request with the most votes and discuss them with our Product team. To learn more about the feature request process, how it works, and how to become part of the magic read here.
